query:
-- Get the Contact Enrichment step detail and check what happened with Lusha
SELECT 
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[13]') as contactEnrichment,
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[20]') as step21,
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[21]') as step22,
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[22]') as step23,
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[23]') as step24
FROM pipelineRuns
WHERE status = 'completed'
ORDER BY startedAt DESC LIMIT 1;
